title: Vesi
description: Deep blues pooling at the edges — a quiet study in stillness and depth.

title: Tuli
description: Burnt oranges and deep reds layered and scraped back.

title: Maa
description: Earth tones — raw umber and ochre. The kind of ground that holds things.

title: Ilma
description: Pale greys and soft whites with a faint warm undertone. Space to breathe.

title: Varjo
description: Near-black with violet shadow — changes with the light in the room.

title: Kasvit
description: Forest greens — soft sage and the yellow-white of light through leaves.

title: Hämärä
description: Dusk colours — rose and dusty mauve and the grey-blue of sky just after sunset.

title: Jää
description: Whites and cold blues — thin layers that feel translucent. Finnish winter.

title: Untitled I
description: Large irregular canvas with layered texture. Warm ochres and raw marks.

title: Untitled II
description: Dark ground with gestural marks in pale grey and rust.

title: Untitled III
description: Sage green ground with pale marks. Quiet and botanical.

title: Untitled IV
description: Terracotta and warm sand. Heat and texture.

title: Untitled V
description: Indigo and pale yellow — a tension between dark and light that resolves quietly.

title: Untitled VII
description: Deep forest — almost black greens. Presence.

title: Untitled VIII
description: Warm rose and raw linen. Soft but not delicate.

title: Untitled IX
description: The largest futon canvas. Layered blues and greys with marks in white. Like looking up.

title: City
description: Grey and concrete and the unexpected warmth of human density.

title: Landscape
description: Horizon line — open sky and Finnish flatness. Space without emptiness.

title: Meadow
description: Summer yellows and greens. The kind of afternoon that lasts.

title: Other World
description: Deep purples and electric blues with a single point of light. Speculative and otherworldly.

title: Tree
description: A single tree — spare and direct. Not symbolic. Just itself.
